title: quay flake: can't talk to a V1 container registry
body:
Not hitting as hard as #17802, but still hitting us hard
```
Error: initializing source docker://quay.io/libpod/alpine_labels:latest: can't talk to a V1 container registry
Error: initializing source docker://quay.io/libpod/testimage:20221018: can't talk to a V1 container registry
Error: getting image source: can't talk to a V1 container registry
```

* debian-12 : int podman debian-12 root host
  * PR #17772
    * [03-14 07:02](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5196916519075840/html/int-podman-debian-12-root-host.log.html) in int podman debian-12 root host: unknown failure
* fedora-36 : sys podman fedora-36 rootless host
  * PR #17772
    * [03-14 07:26](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6489942193340416/html/sys-podman-fedora-36-rootless-host.log.html#t--00034) in [sys] podman image - sign with no sigfile
  * PR #17771
    * [03-14 10:40](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5628221060808704/html/sys-podman-fedora-36-rootless-host.log.html#t--00004) in [sys] podman can pull an image
* fedora-37 : int remote fedora-37 root host [remote]

* fedora-37-aarch64 : sys remote fedora-37-aarch64 root host [remote]
  * PR #17772
    * [03-14 08:19](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6050455269146624/html/sys-remote-fedora-37-aarch64-root-host.log.html#t--00232) in [sys] podman load - multi-image archive

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Blowing up today, mostly in my no-flake-retries PR but also in other PRs. (We have a very low PR volume today)

* debian-12 : int remote debian-12 root host sqlite [remote]
  * PR #17831
    * [04-24 12:44](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6005409308213248/html/int-remote-debian-12-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-create-using-image-list-instance-by-digest--1) in Podman create [It] podman create using image list instance by digest
